top3.sql:
SELECT 
    s_store_name,
    SUM(sr_return_amt) AS total_return_amount
FROM 
    store_returns
JOIN 
    store ON sr_store_sk = s_store_sk
JOIN 
    date_dim ON sr_returned_date_sk = d_date_sk
WHERE 
    d_year = 1998 
    AND d_moy = 9
    AND s_state = 'CA'
GROUP BY 
    s_store_name
ORDER BY 
    total_return_amount DESC
LIMIT 100

final.sql:
SELECT 
    s_store_name,
    SUM(sr_return_amt) AS total_return_amount
FROM 
    store_returns
JOIN 
    store ON sr_store_sk = s_store_sk
JOIN 
    date_dim ON sr_returned_date_sk = d_date_sk
WHERE 
    d_year = 1998 
    AND d_moy = 9
    AND s_state = 'CA'
GROUP BY 
    s_store_name
ORDER BY 
    total_return_amount DESC
LIMIT 100
